notes: Discovery is evidence-only. It may report possible new Hebrew/Israeli channels, but it must not add streams automatically.
Every discovered channel still requires legal/public/free source review before it is added to channels.json.
Do not use piracy lists, paid TV directories, protected APIs, DRM bypasses, fake headers, cookies, or tokenized stream URLs.

sources.notes: Public channel directory used only to detect possible new channel names/LCNs. Not proof of a playable legal stream.
Public Idan+ directory used only to detect possible free-to-air channel lineup changes.

targets.name: Channel 16
targets.notes: Watch target requested for new-channel discovery. Detection only creates a report/issue; it does not add a source.
